exercises.title: Inspect Redis TTLs
exercises.description: Set a key with a TTL and observe how the remaining lifetime changes over time.
exercises.expected_outcome: A key exists with a countdown TTL that shrinks each second.

exercises.title: Watch Cache Traffic
exercises.description: Run Redis MONITOR while a small script reads and writes a single key.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can see the read and write commands in real time.

exercises.title: Implement Cache-Aside
exercises.description: Write a tiny client that reads from Redis, falls back to the origin, and populates the cache on miss.
exercises.expected_outcome: Repeated reads hit Redis after the first miss.

exercises.title: Build an LRU Cache
exercises.description: Implement O(1) get and put using a hash map plus a doubly linked list.
exercises.expected_outcome: Old entries are evicted in least-recently-used order.

exercises.title: Add a Redis Rate Limiter
exercises.description: Build a sliding-window or token-bucket limiter on Redis and expose it as a reusable helper.
exercises.expected_outcome: Requests above the limit are rejected consistently across workers.

exercises.title: Write-Through Cache Layer
exercises.description: Create a small service that writes to the database and cache together, then benchmark read latency.
exercises.expected_outcome: Reads are served from cache and updates stay in sync with the origin.
